51Cr_volume.description: Red cell volume measured using the radioactive (51Cr) cell label for each of the 19 patients. Used together with Biotin volume to compute between-method differences and limits of agreement.

Biotin_volume.description: Red cell volume measured using the non-radioactive (biotin) cell label for each of the 19 patients. Used together with 51Cr volume to compute between-method differences and limits of agreement.

Patient.description: Patient identifier used to identify specific subjects (particularly patients 1 and 18) for potential exclusion based on egg consumption affecting the biotin method.
